languages.text: "Эоганн, если когитатор Нунциуса не обрабатывал информацию все это время, разве он может дискутировать с тобой?"
"Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, если когитатор Нунциуса не обрабатывал информацию все это время, разве он может дискутировать с тобой?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"
"Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"
"Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

languages.text: «Eogunn, si el cogitador de Nuncius no ha estado procesando información en todo este tiempo, ¿cómo puede debatir con usted?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, si el cogitador de Nuncius no ha estado procesando información en todo este tiempo, ¿cómo puede debatir con usted?».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，如果努恩修斯的沉思者并没有在处理信息，那他又怎么能跟你辩论呢？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，如果努恩修斯的沉思者并没有在处理信息，那他又怎么能跟你辩论呢？”

languages.text: « Eogunn, si le cogitateur de Nuncius ne traite actuellement aucune information, comment peut-il débattre avec vous ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, si le cogitateur de Nuncius ne traite actuellement aucune information, comment peut-il débattre avec vous ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, wenn Nuncius' Cogitator in all der Zeit keine Informationen verarbeitet hat, wie kann er dann mit Euch debattieren?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, wenn Nuncius' Cogitator in all der Zeit keine Informationen verarbeitet hat, wie kann er dann mit Euch debattieren?"

languages.text: 「エオガン、もしヌンキウスのコギテーターがずっと情報を処理していないのなら、どうやってあなたと議論を続けることができるのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、もしヌンキウスのコギテーターがずっと情報を処理していないのなら、どうやってあなたと議論を続けることができるのですか？」

languages.text: "Eogunn, Nuncius'un kavramsayarı bunca zamandır bilgi işlemiyorsa seninle nasıl bir tartışma yürütebilir ki?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, if Nuncius's cogitator has not been processing information all this time, how can he carry on a debate with you?"
